name: High School Summer Scholars Program | Pre-College Programs
overnight_evidence_snippet: High School Summer Scholars that choose the residential experience, live on campus in one of our top-ranked, air-conditioned residence halls. name: Tisch Summer High School Residential Program
overnight_evidence_snippet: The Tisch Summer High School Residential Program is an intensive, four-week pre-college program open to high school sophomores and juniors from around the world. The rigorous program is based on the Tisch undergraduate curriculum and the highly structured classes include projects, professional training, and collaboration.
